creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Let’s make the most out of winter season and chill in outdoor lounges while we can! 🥰

Level 43 Sky Lounge is one of our fave rooftop venues in Dubai. 
🌆 Amazing skyline and sunset views
🍸 Happy Hour and Ladies Night offers 
💙 Cool atmosphere 

📍@level43dubai 
🏩 Four Points by Sheraton, Sheikh Zayed Road
🕑 2PM to 2AM

Tag your besties!

transcription.text: And I've been dreaming of you Do you dream of me too? And I've been dreaming of you
